description:
## Goal

After the four extract tickets (az6.1, az6.2, az6.3, az6.4) land, `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` should hold only the **public API surface** — `CancelError`, `refresh_all`, `start`, and the re-exports needed by callers. Target: **~80-120 lines** (down from 797).

## Final shape of src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr

```crystal
require "./semaphore_pool"
require "./feed_fetcher_concurrent"
require "./refresh_supervisor"
require "./refresh_health_reporter"
require "./refresh_health_monitor"

module RefreshLoop
  class CancelError < Exception
    def initialize(message : String = "Refresh cancelled")
      super(message)
    end
  end

  # Public entry point used by app bootstrap / admin.
  def self.start(config_path, cache, db_service) : Nil
    semaphore = SemaphorePool.new
    Supervisor.start(config_path, cache, db_service, semaphore)
    HealthReporter.start
  end

  # Public entry point used by the supervisor and admin.
  def self.refresh_all(config, cache, db_service, cancel_ch = nil) : Nil
    # Move from old refresh_all. Delegates to FeedFetcherConcurrent.fetch_all,
    # then rebuilds new_feeds / new_tabs, updates StateStore, broadcasts.
  end
end

# Backward-compat alias and top-level method shims
alias RefreshHealthMonitor = RefreshLoop::RefreshHealthMonitor

def refresh_all(config, cancel_ch = nil)
  RefreshLoop.refresh_all(config, FeedCache.instance, DatabaseService.instance, cancel_ch)
end

def refresh_all(config, cache, db_service, cancel_ch = nil)
  RefreshLoop.refresh_all(config, cache, db_service, cancel_ch)
end

def start_refresh_loop(config_path, cache, db_service)
  RefreshLoop.start(config_path, cache, db_service)
end
```

## Acceptance

- `wc -l src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` is **<= 200 lines** (target ~120).
- The file contains ONLY:
  - `CancelError` class
  - `def self.refresh_all`
  - `def self.start`
  - Backward-compat alias + top-level shim methods
  - The require statements for the new files
- No `@@` class-level state, no `private def self.fetch_*`, no `State` class, no `start_health_reporter`.
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes.
- Manual smoke: app boots, refresh runs, `GET /api/health` is healthy.

## Dependencies

This ticket blocks on:
- `quickhea-az6.1` (semaphore pool)
- `quickhea-az6.2` (concurrent fetch)
- `quickhea-az6.3` (supervisor)
- `quickhea-az6.4` (health reporter)

## Notes

- The top-level `refresh_all` overloads are kept for backward compatibility — do not change their signatures.
- Consider removing the `_ = RefreshHealthMonitor` alias if no caller uses it (search for `RefreshHealthMonitor` outside `refresh_loop.cr` first). If callers exist, keep it.
title: Slim src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr to a thin public-API module
